name: MORGAN GROUP HOLDING CO
sic_description: Security & Commodity Brokers, Dealers, Exchanges & Services
summary: Morgan Group Holding Co. (MGHL) is a Delaware holding company incorporated in November 2001. Through its wholly-owned subsidiary G.research, LLC, a FINRA-registered broker-dealer, the company provides institutional research and securities brokerage services, including acting as an underwriter. Primary clients include hedge funds, asset managers, and affiliated mutual funds. A significant portion of revenue derives from GAMCO Investors Inc. and its affiliates, which accounted for approximately 61% of commission revenue in 2022.
